contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 75
- Description: Places cost optimization: rate-limit circuit breaker + retire photo qualification + cache definitive negatives
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/100
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/101
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/102
  
  Details:
  Three coordinated PRs to close the loop on Places API spend after diagnosing today's $200+ spike via Cloud Monitoring (11,211 google.places.Details.Http calls / ~600 rows = 18.7 calls per place per day, exact fingerprint of cache being completely bypassed). PR #100: process-level circuit breaker in places_cache.py — when ANY live call returns OVER_QUERY_LIMIT/REQUEST_DENIED/RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED, set _RATE_LIMITED=True so subsequent calls return empty without hitting the API; new is_rate_limited() public for long-sweep callers; hit_list_enrich_contact's fill-gap sweep now bails when breaker trips and tracks attempts (not just successful fills). PR #101: retire photo+Grok qualification rubric — site crawl from detect_circle_hosting_retailers.py becomes the canonical qualifier, with email-aware target (hits + email present → AI: Warm-up needed; hits + no email → AI: Enrich with contact); reject-no-signal default-on (site crawled OK + zero matches → AI: Photo rejected); rescue-rejected default-on (existing photo-rejected rows get re-evaluated under new criteria); hit_list_research_photo_review.yml cron disabled (workflow_dispatch kept for manual debug). PR #102: negative-cache fix — Google statuses now classified into positive (OK), definitive-negative (NOT_FOUND/ZERO_RESULTS/INVALID_REQUEST → cache as negative record so future calls short-circuit), and rate-limited (don't cache). New google_status field in cache schema (back-compat default 'OK' for old records). Live tested: bad place_id first call 1856ms, second call 458ms with no live API hit. Net: closes the three remaining sources of repeated unbilled Places spend.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 125.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
